lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Ah, so you've found my latest donation to the guild. What do you think? Spooky, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just a bit. Is this the original text? It doesn't look that old...

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Oh Guthix, no! These texts were inscribed in rock paper in a tome even I struggled to lift. The writer left it there as a warning, and I assume they didn't want it to be moved.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you translate it?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: I certainly tried... Perhaps there are some date inconsistencies and a few words I had to guess at. I'd found a lot of scrolls detailing trade with early Fremennik tribes too, which certainly helped.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Imcandoria... Do you think that's where the Imcando dwarves originate?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: It certainly seems reasonable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Well met, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: I'm Freja, the Kyattess of the Fremennik Province. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh me? I'm [player name], an adventurer... I guess.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: You must have done something impressive to gain entry here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I may have killed some dragons.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Ah, fantastic! I've yet to face one myself, but I look forward to the challenge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What grand feats are you known for?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Much like you, I have a book or two detailing such things, but it seems to have gone walkabouts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything particularly interesting?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: All of it is incredibly interesting! I slew the great Smolodin Kyatt that plagued the province for many years!

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: I retrieved the crown of many heads from the bottomless snake pit! I hunted the silver stag of the western provinces!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: None of that sounds at all boring. I look forward to finding your book.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Funny you should mention boars. I'm currently hunting one... well, I was...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: My current quest took me to Acheron, a horribly bitter northern territory, in search for this famous boar. As big as a hut, so the songs say.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Anyway, my companions all met a rather grizzly end, so I guess I'm looking for new ones.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take me! I'm great.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Ha! You're very new here. You've certainly proved you are a worthy hero, but I'd rather someone with a few more years behind them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? I've literally defeated a group of dragons that threatened to kill everyone, I think I'm ready for a boar hunt.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: Hmm... When it comes time for me to venture back to the Isle of Garmr, I'll consider inviting you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.text: I'll see you around.
